sourcePrompt: An M151 MUTT, the US quarter-ton utility jeep, about three and a half meters long with all four tires on the ground. A small open-topped jeep: a flat windshield folded upright above a flat grille with two round headlights, an open two-seat body with simple bucket seats and a flat hood, big square wheel arches over knobby tires. Low-poly, +X forward, ground at Y=0; named pivots for moving parts.
